Jonathan Reyes
Management Consultant — Strategy, New York, NY
jonathan.reyes@example.com | 555-201-3004 | linkedin.com/in/jonathan-reyes

SUMMARY
Management consultant with 6 years advising Fortune 500 clients on corporate
strategy, operating-model design, and digital transformation. Engagement
manager experienced leading case teams, structuring ambiguous problems, and
presenting recommendations to C-suite stakeholders.

EXPERIENCE
Engagement Manager — Apex Strategy Consulting (2021–present)
- Led strategy and transformation engagements for retail and financial-services
  clients, owning problem structuring, hypothesis trees, and the final
  recommendation deck presented to executive committees.
- Built business cases and market-entry analyses; quantified a $120M cost-out
  opportunity through an operating-model redesign.
- Managed case teams of 3–5 consultants and the client relationship day to day.

Consultant / Business Analyst — Apex Strategy Consulting (2018–2021)
- Conducted market research, competitive benchmarking, and financial analysis to
  support growth-strategy and change-management workstreams.

SKILLS
Management consulting, corporate strategy, digital transformation, problem
structuring, hypothesis-driven, business case, market research, operating model,
change management, stakeholder management, executive presentations, advisory,
market sizing

EDUCATION
MBA, Columbia Business School, 2018
B.A. Economics, University of Michigan, 2014
